headline: How The Story On Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) Is Shifting With New Targets And Guidance
summary: Packaging Corporation of America has seen its modelled fair value per share lifted from US$226.40 to US$234.30, a change of about 3.5% that puts fresh attention on where the stock might sit relative to updated targets. That move comes as recent Street research has been active and mixed, with some analysts raising price targets and others trimming theirs, reflecting different views on valuation, pricing execution, and demand for containerboard and corrugated packaging. As you read on, you will...
